rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies two well-grounded improvements confirmed in the diff: adding @[simp] to fiberHomeomorph_one and removing the redundant .mp/.mpr wrapper lemmas that bloat the API surface. Review 2 overlaps on the @[simp] point but misses the redundant lemmas entirely and proposes a contested @[simp] on fiberHomeomorph_mul plus a speculative inverse lemma not clearly warranted by what the diff shows.
